tasks.subject: Task 0: botSystem read-side enumerator seam (enumerateConnectingMoves)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract generateBotMove's per-actor candidate ranking into a pure helper (_rankConnectingCandidates) and add a fail-closed exported enumerateConnectingMoves returning up to `limit` {tmdbId,mediaType,viaActor}, behaviour-preserving for generateBotMove; also export the existing _tmdbHeaders env-headers helper for Task 2's no-ctx timeout aftercare.

**Files:** Modify server/systems/botSystem.js (generateBotMove ~180-191, add helpers, module.exports L319 add enumerateConnectingMoves + _tmdbHeaders); Test server/systems/botSystem.enumerate.test.js (new).

**Verify:** npx jest server/systems/botSystem.enumerate.test.js server/systems/botSystem.test.js server/systems/botSystem.schedule.test.js server/systems/matchSystem.botmove.test.js server/systems/lobbySystem.botlifecycle.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["server/systems/botSystem.js","server/systems/botSystem.enumerate.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest server/systems/botSystem.enumerate.test.js server/systems/botSystem.test.js server/systems/botSystem.schedule.test.js server/systems/matchSystem.botmove.test.js server/systems/lobbySystem.botlifecycle.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["\u2264limit results each with bridging viaActor from last cast","deduped by tmdbId, deterministic with rng:()=>0","fail-closed [] on empty chain/no credits/errors, never throws","generateBotMove regression suites stay green","_tmdbHeaders exported (reused by Task 2 no-ctx headers)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: matchSystem multi-out wrapper + invalid-connection outs emit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rework _computeCouldHavePlayed to return ≤3 {title,year,viaActor} outs via enumerateConnectingMoves (timeout/fail-closed discipline preserved); invalid-connection youWereEliminated emits `outs` not `couldHavePlayed`; export _computeCouldHavePlayed/resolveCandidates/topCastNames.

**Files:** Modify server/systems/matchSystem.js (_computeCouldHavePlayed 409-459, emit ~281-296, exports); Test server/systems/matchSystem.aftercare.test.js (new) + migrate couldHavePlayed assertions in matchSystem.test.js/integration.test.js.

**Verify:** npx jest server/systems/matchSystem.aftercare.test.js server/systems/matchSystem.test.js server/integration.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["server/systems/matchSystem.js","server/systems/matchSystem.aftercare.test.js","server/systems/matchSystem.test.js","server/integration.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest server/systems/matchSystem.aftercare.test.js server/systems/matchSystem.test.js server/integration.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["outs:[{title,year,viaActor}] \u22643 deduped or null","whole batch within COULD_HAVE_PLAYED_TIMEOUT_MS, fail-closed null","invalid emit carries outs / omits when none; yourGuess/lastChainEntry/reason unchanged","_computeCouldHavePlayed+resolveCandidates+topCastNames exported; pre-7.1 assertions migrated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: gameLogic timeout-only private youWereEliminated
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In eliminateCurrentPlayer, for a human (stableId) non-team connected player eliminated by timeout (_categorizeReason==='timeout'), privately emit youWereEliminated {lastChainEntry,reason,timedOut:true,outs?} (no yourGuess), bounded + fail-closed, not affecting other callers.

**Files:** Modify server/gameLogic.js (eliminateCurrentPlayer 175-206, insert before checkWinCondition L202); Test server/gameLogic.aftercare.test.js (new).

**Verify:** npx jest server/gameLogic.aftercare.test.js server/turn-watchdog.test.js server/turn-sweep.test.js server/integration.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["server/gameLogic.js","server/gameLogic.aftercare.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest server/gameLogic.aftercare.test.js server/turn-watchdog.test.js server/turn-sweep.test.js server/integration.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["human non-team connected timeout \u2192 private youWereEliminated timedOut:true no yourGuess","NOT for bot/quit/disconnect/typo-cap/team","outs omitted when null; nextTurn not blocked beyond bound","existing timeout/watchdog/integration suites green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: client outs block + timeout variant in showSelfEliminationScreen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render ≤3 outs rows ({title} ({year}) — via {actor}) + 'You were one bridge away.'; timeout variant (detailed card, needed-only column, no You-played); preserve no-innerHTML, legacy flash, dismiss/Escape/focus.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js (showSelfEliminationScreen 43-164: guard L48, .self-elim-could 124-130/154-155, hint 132-136); Test client-tests/self-elim-aftercare.test.js (new) + migrate client couldHavePlayed/self-elim-could assertions.

**Verify:** npx jest client-tests/self-elim-aftercare.test.js client-tests/

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js","client-tests/self-elim-aftercare.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/self-elim-aftercare.test.js client-tests/","acceptanceCriteria":["outs list \u22643 with via-actor + bridge line; replaces generic hint","timedOut \u2192 detailed card, needed-only, no You-played column, time head","no outs+no timedOut \u2261 pre-7.1 detailed card; detail-less \u2261 legacy flash","titles/actors rendered as text (no innerHTML)"]}
```
